nasb.text: Babylon will become a heap of ruins, a haunt of jackals, An object of horror and hissing, without inhabitants.

esv.text: and Babylon shall become a heap of ruins, the haunt of jackals, a horror and a hissing, without inhabitant.

cnv.text: 巴比倫必變成亂堆， 成為野狗的巢穴， 成為令人驚駭和嗤笑的對象， 沒有人居住。

ccb.text: 巴比伦必沦为废墟，杳无人迹， 沦为豺狼出没的地方， 令人惊惧、嗤笑。
